title: Move agent identity resolution behind PlatformAdapter
description: Extract the 3 identity-resolution functions and KNOWN_AGENTS registry from session-scanner.ts into ClaudeCodeAdapter. Add resolveAgentIdentity() to PlatformAdapter interface. Rewire all 4 call sites in session-state.ts to use the adapter.

scope.in: Add resolveAgentIdentity() to PlatformAdapter interface. Implement in ClaudeCodeAdapter. Rewire session-state.ts call sites. Keep identity functions in session-scanner.ts as exports.
scope.out: Moving non-identity scanner functions. Changing SessionFileState type. Adding other platform adapters. Refactoring parent agent map cache.

dod.criterion: ClaudeCodeAdapter implements it using existing detection functions
session-state.ts uses adapter instead of direct scanner imports for identity
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Add resolveAgentIdentity() to PlatformAdapter and implement in ClaudeCodeAdapter
tasks.user_scenario: No visible change — internal refactor. Agent names still appear correctly on the dashboard.
tasks.scope: Add resolveAgentIdentity(filePath, state) to PlatformAdapter interface in types.ts. Implement in ClaudeCodeAdapter by calling existing extractAgentIdentityFromFile, resolveAgentFromParent, resolveAgentFromSetting from session-scanner.ts. Include .meta.json reading as a CC-specific detection path between agent-setting and prompt parsing.

dod.criterion: PlatformAdapter has resolveAgentIdentity(filePath, state) returning {name, role} | undefined
ClaudeCodeAdapter implements it with fallback chain: agent-setting entry → .meta.json sidecar → prompt pattern → parent cross-ref
Identity functions remain exported from session-scanner.ts — no breaking changes

tasks.title: Rewire session-state.ts identity calls through adapter and verify
tasks.user_scenario: No visible change — agent identity detection works identically.
tasks.scope: session-state.ts functions (bootstrapFromTail, processFileUpdate, initializeAllFileStates, processEntry) accept PlatformAdapter and use adapter.resolveAgentIdentity(). Remove direct identity imports from session-scanner.ts in session-state.ts.

dod.criterion: All 4 call sites in session-state.ts use adapter.resolveAgentIdentity() instead of direct scanner calls
Direct imports of identity functions removed from session-state.ts
npm run type-check passes with zero errors
